pages.text: $(bold)Pillar Cactus Seed$()$(br2)A columnar desert cactus. Pressed from cactus + sand.
pages.title: Pillar Cactus Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant on sand to raise the dynamic pillar cactus.$(br2)$(bold)Make:$() $(italic)Cactus$() + $(italic)Sand$() → this seed. One-way; no sapling.
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
